result.stdout:
WebSharper .NET CLI version 10.0.19
USAGE: dotnet ws [--help] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    build <options>       Build the WebSharper project in the current folder
                          (or in the nearest parent folder). You can optionally
                          specify a project file using `--project`.
    start <options>       Start the Booster service (wsfscservice) with the
                          given RID and version. If no value is given for
                          version, the latest (as found in the local NuGet
                          cache) will be used.
    stop <options>        Send a stop signal to the Booster service with the
                          given version. If no version is given all running
                          instances are signaled. Use `--force` to kill
                          process(es) instead of sending a stop signal.
    info                  Prints the version of the dotnet ws tool
    list                  List running Booster versions and their source paths.
    compile <options>     Compile a given fs(x) file to JavaScript or
                          TypeScript utilizing WebSharper's Booster if enabled
    watch <options>       Sets up a file watcher, that triggers recompilation
                          via dotnet ws compile or dotnet ws build depending on
                          the scenario

    Use 'dotnet ws <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --help                display this list of options.
.

    info                  Prints the version of the dotnet ws tool

    compile <options>     Compile a given fs(x) file to JavaScript or

    watch <options>       Sets up a file watcher, that triggers recompilation

result.stdout:
WebSharper .NET CLI version 10.0.19
USAGE: dotnet ws compile [--help] [--output <string>] [--version <string>]
                         [--standalone] [--path <string>] [--typescript]
                         [--debug] [--watch] [--force] [<string>]

FILEPATH:

    <string>              Specify the path to the file to compile.

OPTIONS:

    --output, -o <string> Specify the name of the output file. Also forces the
                          compilation to use BundleOnly mode.
    --version, -v <string>
                          Specify the version of WebSharper to use.
    --standalone, -s      Standalone mode.
    --path, -p <string>   Specify the output location for library mode.
    --typescript, -ts     Enable TypeScript output.
    --debug, -d           Use debug mode for compilation.
    --watch, -w           Initiates a file watcher for the given fsx file.
    --force               Forces the temporary folder to be flushed before the
                          compilation.
    --help                display this list of options.
.

commands.payload:
WebSharper .NET CLI version 10.0.19
USAGE: dotnet ws compile [--help] [--output <string>] [--version <string>]
                         [--standalone] [--path <string>] [--typescript]
                         [--debug] [--watch] [--force] [<string>]

FILEPATH:

    <string>              Specify the path to the file to compile.

OPTIONS:

    --output, -o <string> Specify the name of the output file. Also forces the
                          compilation to use BundleOnly mode.
    --version, -v <string>
                          Specify the version of WebSharper to use.
    --standalone, -s      Standalone mode.
    --path, -p <string>   Specify the output location for library mode.
    --typescript, -ts     Enable TypeScript output.
    --debug, -d           Use debug mode for compilation.
    --watch, -w           Initiates a file watcher for the given fsx file.
    --force               Forces the temporary folder to be flushed before the
                          compilation.
    --help                display this list of options.
.

WebSharper .NET CLI version 10.0.19
USAGE: dotnet ws start [--help] --rid <win-x64|linux-x64|linux-musl-x64>
                       [--version <semver>]

OPTIONS:

    --rid, -r <win-x64|linux-x64|linux-musl-x64>
                          Specify the Runtime Identifier
                          (win-x64|linux-x64|linux-musl-x64) to use.
    --version, -v <semver>
                          Specify the version of the Booster service.
    --help                display this list of options.
.

result.stdout:
WebSharper .NET CLI version 10.0.19
USAGE: dotnet ws stop [--help] [--version <semver>] [--force] [--clear-cache]

OPTIONS:

    --version, -v <semver>
                          Specify the version of the Booster service.
    --force, -f           Force the specified operation (used for the stop
                          subcommand).
    --clear-cache         Clear local temp folder data.
    --help                display this list of options.
.
